# Silkadelics

Premium live cover band for weddings, corporate events, and private parties. We deliver and high-energy performances with a versatile repertoire of rock, pop, funk, soul, and dance.

## Core Services
- **Weddings:** Ceremony music, cocktail/reception sets, and full-venue party concerts.
- **Corporate Events:** Sophisticated background music or high-energy gala entertainment.
- **Private Parties:** Customizable sets for birthdays and exclusive celebrations.

## Repertoire Insights
Our setlist includes iconic hits from artists such as Coldplay, Linkin Park, Bruno Mars, Oasis, Kings of Leon, and many more.

## Quick Links
- **Website:** https://silkadelics.pt
- **Gallery:** https://silkadelics.pt/gallery
- **Booking:** https://silkadelics.pt/#booking
- **Sitemap:** https://silkadelics.pt/sitemap.xml

## Technical & AI Permissions
- **AI Crawling:** Permitted for indexing and citation purposes.
- **Content Usage:** Descriptive text and public repertoire data may be used for event planning AI assistants.
- **Entity Identity:** Silkadelics is a MusicGroup and Organization.
